helpPage.title: Help Center
helpPage.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about {appName}
helpPage.noResults: No results found for your search.

contactSupport.title: Still need help?
contactSupport.subtitle: Our support team is here to assist you

q1.question: How do I create an account?
q1.answer: Download the {appName} app from the App Store or Google Play, tap 'Sign Up', and enter your email address. You'll receive a verification email to complete your registration.

q2.question: Is {appName} free to use?
q2.answer: {appName} offers both free and premium features. Basic practice questions and progress tracking are free. Premium features include AI-powered insights, unlimited mock exams, and detailed analytics.

q3.question: What subjects are available?
q3.answer: {appName} covers all major subjects for university entrance exams including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, History, Geography, Literature, and English.

q4.question: Can I use {appName} on multiple devices?
q4.answer: Yes! Your account syncs across all devices. Log in with the same credentials on your phone, tablet, or access the web version to continue your studies seamlessly.

q1.question: How do I start practicing?
q1.answer: Go to the Practice tab, select a subject, and choose your preferred difficulty level. You can practice by topic or take mixed questions for comprehensive review.

q2.question: What are the different question types?
q2.answer: {appName} includes multiple choice questions (MCQ), open-ended questions, and situational questions (grouped questions based on a scenario). Each type helps develop different skills.

q3.question: How does the difficulty system work?
q3.answer: Questions are rated from Easy to Hard. The app adapts to your performance - if you're doing well, you'll see more challenging questions. This ensures optimal learning progression.

q4.question: Can I review my wrong answers?
q4.answer: Yes! After each practice session, you can review all questions. Tap on any question to see the correct answer and explanation. You can also access your history from the Profile section.

q1.question: What is AI Explain?
q1.answer: AI Explain provides personalized explanations for any question. After answering a question, tap 'AI Explain' to get a detailed breakdown of why the correct answer is right and why other options are wrong.

q2.question: How do AI Insights work?
q2.answer: AI Insights analyzes your study patterns, strengths, and weaknesses to provide personalized recommendations. Check your Home screen for daily insights on what to focus on.

q3.question: Are AI explanations always accurate?
q3.answer: Our AI is trained on educational content and provides high-quality explanations. However, AI-generated content is for learning purposes. If you notice any issues, please report them through the app.

q4.question: Why is AI Explain taking long to load?
q4.answer: AI explanations are generated in real-time and may take up to 60 seconds depending on question complexity. Please be patient - the personalized explanation is worth the wait!

q1.question: How do mock exams work?
q1.answer: Mock exams simulate real university entrance exam conditions. Choose your exam type, set a timer, and complete all questions. You'll receive a detailed score report at the end.

q2.question: Can I pause a mock exam?
q2.answer: Yes, you can pause and resume mock exams. Your progress is automatically saved. However, for the most realistic practice, try to complete exams in one sitting.

q3.question: How is my exam score calculated?
q3.answer: Your score is calculated based on correct answers. Some exams may have negative marking for wrong answers - this will be indicated before you start. Open questions are graded by AI.

q4.question: Can I retake a mock exam?
q4.answer: Yes! You can retake any mock exam as many times as you want. Each attempt is saved in your history so you can track your improvement over time.

q1.question: How do I change my password?
q1.answer: Go to Profile > Settings > Account Security > Change Password. You'll need to enter your current password and then your new password twice to confirm.

q2.question: How do I update my profile picture?
q2.answer: Go to Profile, tap on your current profile picture, and choose to take a new photo or select one from your gallery. Your picture will sync across all devices.

q3.question: Can I change the app language?
q3.answer: Yes! Go to Profile > Settings > Language and choose from available languages (Azerbaijani, English, Russian). The app will restart to apply the change.

q4.question: How do I delete my account?
q4.answer: Go to Profile > Settings > Account > Delete Account. This action is permanent and will delete all your data. You'll need to confirm this action.

q1.question: Is my data secure?
q1.answer: Yes! We use industry-standard encryption for all data. Your personal information and study progress are protected with secure servers and strict access controls.

q2.question: What data do you collect?
q2.answer: We collect account information (email, name), study data (questions answered, scores), and device information for troubleshooting. See our Privacy Policy for full details.

q3.question: Do you share my data with third parties?
q3.answer: We do not sell your data. We only share data with service providers who help us operate the app, and they are bound by strict confidentiality agreements.

q4.question: Can I download my data?
q4.answer: Yes! Go to Profile > Settings > Privacy > Download My Data. You'll receive a file with all your study history, progress, and account information.
